If You Did Not Receive ALL Pages, Please Call Our Office
8402 West Centennial Parkway 8205 West Warm Springs Road 2930 West Horizon Ridge Parkway
ICD 10: S/P 1 L.TKA skilled nursing visit for
3033 Harewood Ave N Las Vegas, NV
2011 E Lake Mead Blvd North Las Vegas,
F/U Knee Osteoarthritis, Left evaluated on March 25, 2026
HPI: This is a 66 year old female who:
1. is following up for Knee Osteoarthritis on the left knee.
She is here to discuss surgery.
Left Knee: Normal alignment, no deformity, no
The following images were ordered and obtained:
Additional Images: LT KNEE 3V WB AP, LAT, SUNRISE
Specific Findings: xrays demonstrating severe degenerative joint disease with joint space
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
The importance of maintaining an ideal body weight or
losing weight to reduce stress on the knee joint is a cornestone of nonoperative
The diseased parts of the knee are replaced with metal and plastic.
dramatic improvement in their ability to perform common activities of daily living.
impact activities should be avoided after surgery, if possible, to prolong the life of the
Serious complications occur in less than 2% of patients.
limited to infection, injury to blood vessels and nerves, blood clots, heart complications,
Other Instructions: Post-op visit 10-14 dates after surgery date
physical therapy, and use of supportive

consistencyChecks.title: M1700/M1710 vs Mental Status selections
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents describe mental-status evidence as Visit Note - March 31, 2026 Additional Notes: DNVI Visit Note - March 31, 2026 Impression/Plan: Plan: Counseling - Preoperative Instructions. Plan: Counseling - Knee DJD., and the chart snapshot does not currently show corresponding mental-status selections.

consistencyChecks.title: B1000 vision impairment vs glasses selection
consistencyChecks.detail: The chart snapshot does not currently show a vision-related entry, so B1000 vision impairment and any glasses selection still require reconciliation from chart evidence.

consistencyChecks.title: Respiratory findings vs M1400 shortness of breath answer
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents describe respiratory support with Visit Note - March 31, 2026 Additional Notes: DNVI Visit Note - March 31, 2026 Impression/Plan: Plan: Counseling - Preoperative Instructions. Plan: Counseling - Knee DJD.. Chart respiratory status currently reads blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Functional M items vs GG0130 and GG0170 scores
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support function with weakness, gait, transfer, and endurance limitations. Chart GG0130/GG0170 values currently read self-care=blank and mobility=blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Wound answers vs integumentary details and wound worksheet
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support wound status with wound care needs and lower-extremity ulcer history. Chart wound/Norton support currently reads integumentary=blank and Norton=blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Pain presence vs J0510/J0520/J0530 logic
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents show pain-related support as pain medication and pain-management instructions. Chart pain narrative currently reads blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Depression diagnosis/documentation vs D0150 completion
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support mood history with depression diagnosis and confusion-related documentation. Chart emotional or behavioral status currently reads blank.
